violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the dining area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Door gasket of the walk-in freezer observed in poor repair. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2026

The floor and wall junctures to the side and behind the 2-door reach-in do not have coving. The coving under the 3-bay sink has come away from the floor/wall juncture. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee certified in food safety management was not available at the time of this inspection. Chef is in the process of recertifying. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the milk cold hold unit observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

A couple of the cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in condenser fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The floor under the 2-door reach-in is in poor repair. Tiles are missing and the subfloor is unsealed cement. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be repaired using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

A few of the cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration gaskets have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Ambient temperature of 2-door reach-in observed at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient temperature this morning recorded at 42 degrees F. Product temperature observed at 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Small amount of TCS foods were moved to walk-in cooler. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
